metadata.device_profile: Budget Android (CPU 4× throttle, low GPU, 256 MB Phaser cap)
metadata.note: Initial measurements on unoptimized codebase. Phase 3+ optimizes based on these baselines.

drag_latency_ms.description: Pointer-to-paint latency across drag archetypes (Partition, SnapMatch, Make, Placement, Benchmark, Order)

frame_time_steady_ms.description: Frame time during steady-state gameplay (MenuScene idle)

ceremony_frame_time_ms.description: Frame time during SessionComplete ceremony (tweens + animations)

heap_delta_mb.description: Heap growth across 50 scene transitions (menu↔level↔menu loop)

optimization_targets.issue: Drag latency P95 = 48 ms (target 50 ms) — margin is 2 ms
candidates: Text re-layout on drag (switch to BitmapText)

optimization_targets.issue: Heap delta P95 = 4.8 MB (target 5.0 MB) — approaching budget
candidates: Tween targets pointing at destroyed game objects
A11yLayer DOM listeners not removed in destroy
Event emitters added without paired off in shutdown

optimization_targets.issue: Cold start P95 = 1800 ms (target 2500 ms) — well within budget

next_phases: Phase 3: Drag input pipeline tuning (P95 latency ≤ 50 ms per archetype)
Phase 4: Tween budget & frame-rate guard (P95 frame ≤ 20 ms steady-state)
Phase 5: Scene teardown & leak hunt (heap delta ≤ 5 MB / 50 transitions)
